title: Travel Story Template 002
desc: Reusable travel story prompt for generating consistent visual outputs with a moody and atmospheric tone.
prompt_template: Create a {visual_style} image of {subject} in {location}. Use {lens} framing, {lighting} setup, and a {palette} color palette. Keep composition optimized for {output_format} and preserve a {mood} mood.
author: AI Image Prompt Hub Team
final_prompt: Create a photorealistic travel story image of a cozy family morning scene in a museum-like white room. Use macro close-up framing, neon mixed lighting, and electric magenta and cyan color treatment. Output for 4:5 social media crop while maintaining a moody and atmospheric emotional tone.
